name: SoulPactum
short_description: Sell ​​your soul! Test yourself in this difficult ragegame!SoulPactum is a brutal 2D platformer where every wrong jump ends in failure. Precise timing and patience are the keys to finally making it through the deadly levels. Are you up for the challenge?
detailed_description:
[ENG]

This is my first game that started as a school project, but I have always had a great desire to make games for people, so I would like to share a rudimentary version with you and then develop it further and further.

I think this game is a very difficult ragegame type game, it is not a coincidence that it is called SoulPactum. In the game I create almost impossible levels, there are no tricks or invisible traps, only difficulty. Timing and observing the movement of the traps on the level are very important. Currently, some traps are available with 3 ready-made levels. In the future, I would like to have co-op levels, leveled levels, more traps, abilities for different skins, endless levels, competition with other players, so I still have a lot of ideas and I'm trying to develop them according to time and knowledge.

I had to make the game with free resource packs because I did not have the budget or support to make unique textures/sounds.

I hope that as many people as possible will like my game and that you will help its development in a constructive way!

I am happy to accept all ideas and help.

supported_languages: Hungarian, English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese
